meta.title: Dashboard - VPN Command Center
meta.description: Secure VPN administration dashboard with real-time monitoring, analytics, and network management

title: VPN COMMAND CENTER
opsBaseline: Users, nodes, traffic, and geographic coverage

cabinet.title: CyberVPN Personal Cabinet
cabinet.subtitle: A customer-first control room for your plan, VPN readiness, traffic, wallet, rewards, notifications, and security posture.

sync.title: Backend sync state
sync.neverSynced: No backend snapshot has been loaded yet.

healthy.title: Healthy
healthy.description: Your account has an active service state and no urgent customer actions.

attention.title: Needs attention
attention.description: One or more account signals need review: provisioning, traffic, expiry, or notifications.

critical.title: Action required
critical.description: Your VPN access may be expired, blocked, or near a usage limit. Review the next actions before connecting.

actions.managePlanDescription: Renew, upgrade, or review active limits.
actions.getConfigDescription: Open servers and import connection profiles.
actions.finishProvisioningDescription: Provision the missing access channel or credential.
actions.reviewNotificationsDescription: Open action-required delivery and reward updates.
actions.startTrialDescription: Activate your eligible trial before choosing a plan.
actions.watchTrafficDescription: Check usage before the current period closes.
actions.inviteDescription: Share rewards and track pending payouts.

traffic.title: Traffic
traffic.empty: Usage snapshot is not loaded yet
traffic.unmetered: Current plan has no traffic cap

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.empty: Wallet snapshot is not loaded yet

notifications.title: Inbox
notifications.empty: Notification counters are not loaded yet

readiness.title: Connection delivery state
readiness.description: This panel checks whether your subscription, provisioning profile, device credential, and access channel line up with the backend.

notifications.title: Latest account signals
notifications.description: Recent delivery, rewards, payment, and admin updates from the backend notification system.
notifications.empty: No visible customer notifications right now.
notifications.errorDescription: The dashboard is still usable. Retry the notification stream or continue to settings and payments.

items.cookieSession: Web auth uses httpOnly cookies; tokens are not exposed to browser JavaScript.
items.twoFactor: Enable or review two-factor authentication in settings.
items.antiPhishing: Set an anti-phishing code before trusting operational emails.
items.notifications: Keep critical delivery and payment notifications enabled.
